seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mermaid Beach and Merrimac. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mermaid Beach vs Merrimac: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mermaid Beach and Merrimac.
heading: Mermaid Beach vs Merrimac — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mermaid Beach, Queensland and Merrimac, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mermaid Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Merrimac (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mermaid Beach or Merrimac safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mermaid Beach has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Merrimac scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mermaid Beach scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Merrimac scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mermaid Beach or Merrimac?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mermaid Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
